title: Measurement protocol for the Multiplex assay using the CQ1 and files containing the settings to operate the CQ1 microscope with Momentum
author: Amelie Tjaden
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Here you can find the measurement protocol for the high-content Multiplex assay using the CQ1 confocal microscope (Yokogawa) and the setting files to operate the protocol using the MOMENTUM automatization system. 

 More details can be found in a publication to come.
steps_raw:
